goal: Design production advanced-confirmation policy for generated, script-managed, and symlink-managed targets while keeping all production gates false.

confirmationRequirements: generated, script-managed, script-referenced, symlink-managed, and symlink target classes require advanced confirmation later
hard blocks cannot be overridden by advanced confirmation
acknowledgementText: I understand this file may be changed by scripts.
I understand this file appears to be generated.
I understand this file is symlink-managed.
I understand writing here may be overwritten outside the app.
I understand the app must back up, write, reread, verify, and recover safely.

hardBlockPolicy.overrideBehavior: advanced confirmation cannot override hard blocks
proofRequiredLater: no script or Lua execution required

firstPilotExclusionPolicy.normalTarget: one existing scalar line in one normal config file

recommendationRiskIntegration.model: write_target_recommendation uses production_advanced_confirmation risk explanations for blocked targets
blockedTargetReasons: advanced confirmation is not active yet
advanced confirmation cannot override hard blocks

copy: Some files may be changed by scripts, generated by tools, or managed through symlinks.
These targets are excluded from the first production write pilot.
Advanced confirmation is not active yet.
Real writing is not active yet.

uiChanges: Added disabled advanced-confirmation copy to the existing production backup and verification section.
No active confirmation controls or handlers were added.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts left uncommitted

proofUsed: Risk classification tests for normal, generated, script-managed, script-referenced, symlink-managed, symlink target, high-risk, and duplicate targets.
Advanced-confirmation policy tests proving acknowledgement text exists and production confirmation remains unavailable.
Hard-block tests proving missing-line, structured, unreadable, script/Lua-required, and duplicate targets cannot be overridden.
First-pilot exclusion tests proving risky target classes are excluded and the pilot gate remains false.
Recommendation integration tests proving blocked reasons include risk causes and inactive confirmation copy.
Source-level Apply/write isolation tests proving write_flow.rs does not import or call the new policy.
proofStillMissing: No production advanced-confirmation UI is active.
No production write-target selection is active.
No production backup/write/reread/recovery flow is active.
No high-risk approval integration for risky target classes is active.
nextRecommendedSprint: Design production high-risk approval integration boundary for the one-target pilot while keeping all production gates false.
